content: Hello! I was told that here I can send some things that are poorly translated into the new languages that were implemented in the recent patch, I am a person who speaks Spanish and I could detect several errors in the main menu and in the names of the characters (ando ther minor words) and I would like to know if there is a form or how I should report these errors to improve the game

I will point out in parts:

In the part of the character's name, it is better to respect the names that are in the English translation, in this case the character named Karen, the name was changed to “Kalon” (later I make a list of mistranslated names and the names they should have, because there a lot of characters that have this issue)

On the other hand we have the name of the Realms, in Spanish it was translated as “dominio” which is wrong, Realm is translated as “Reino” in Spanish and “domain” as “dominio”, this word is also found in other descriptions as in the covenants or in the stat called “Realm mastery” but the correct word in Spanish is “Reino”,

Now, the name of the Realms in English should be the following: 

Caos= Caos (this word is ok)
Oceano Profundo= Aquor
Carne= Caro
Transdimensional= Ultra

In this case, the English names are respected because although the translation is fine, in the context of the game, it is out of place.

Finally, the stat that says “atacar” is simply translated as “ataque”. because teh word "atacar" its the action inthe game, but in a stat context, the correct word should be "ataque"
In this case the name should be: "Cadena de Sangre: Helot"
"Celeste" instead of Sileste
"Faros" instead of Falos, this needs to be corrected as soon as possible, becasue the word "Falos" in spanish means a part of male body that is used for sexual activity
"Sanga" instead of Shan
"Agrippa" instead of Agripa, even the translation is fine, in case of the names is not really needed a translation english-Spanish
"Nymphaea" or just "Ninfa" instead of Ninfia, both words work as well
"Nautilla" instead of Nodira
"Hamelin" or " Hameln" instead of Hamlin
"Goliath" or "Goliat" instead of Goria
"Ryker" instead of Lake
"Caecus" instead of Kaikes
"Aurita" instead of Oreta
"Leigh" instead of Leia
"Faint" instead of Feint
"Tinct" instead of Tincter
"Winkle" instead of Wenkle
"Daffodil" instead of Dafdel
"Horla" instead of Orla
"Helot" instead of Hilo
in case of ramona it ssould be: "Genesis: Ramona" instead of Orbita Ramona
"Lotan" instead of Rotan
"Doll" instead of Dor
"Casiah" instead of Cassia (even the translation is good here, however previously i mentioned that the names shouldnt be trasnlated english/spanish
"Alva" instead of Aelva
yes<:flop:1236937860922343466>  its a lot of issues, the most noticeable are the names of the characters
i didnt even finish to mention all the wrong names 😅 🫠
"Uvhash" isntead of Yuuhaashi
"Thais" instead of Taisis
i think i finish with the names
i know there´s still more words that are out of place, but its minor compared to the names issue

I started to investigate the stats more in depth and, besides that the font does not fit in the image, instead of “tasa crítica” it is better to put “probabilidad crítica” or “prob. critica” for short, it is easier to understand for the player.

and again we have the problem of the word “Maestria de Dominio” that should be “Maestría de reino” this error is also in the description of the Covenants that buff this stat.
i know it should be more mistakes around there, but until the issue of the size of the font is solved, i can see really well other issues

and finally, some corrections or translation suggestions regarding the initial screen:

in the part of “Despertado” they should put either “Awakers” or simply “Personajes” so the player will know that he can see his characters there.

in “Recursos” they should put “Inventory” so the player knows that this is where he can see his characters weapons and other things he owns.

in “Ensayo entre actos” they should put the word “Resources” so players will know that this is where they can farm materials and see other game modes.

Finally, in “Phase Duel” they should put next to the word “PvP” or something to let players know that this option is there, even so in this section, it is not mandatory to change it as it does not affect the translation.
for now, thats all the words that i can detect for now
oh, ok i understand, no worries, i only hope that at least the names can be fixed, becasue that maybe could be a major issue in future, however, thanks for letting me know ✨ 🫡
